# [clang] -fexperimental-new-constant-interpreter option causes a crash

**Author:** k-arrows
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/152822
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer, clang:bytecode
**Closed Date:** 2025-08-09T16:30:27Z

## Body

Reproducer:
https://godbolt.org/z/fTvxjYe47
```cpp
namespace B {
  struct A { ~A(); };
  int &h() __attribute__((enable_if((A(), true), "")));
}
```

Backtrace:
```console
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```
